steps.title: Identify the elaboration cue
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with “Turning away from landscapes…”, which directly expands on the earlier claim that Johnson’s style underwent an abrupt transformation upon his return.

steps.title: Apply the cue to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: “It elaborates on the previous sentence’s statement about a transitional moment in Johnson’s artistic career.” The underlined sentence does exactly that — it specifies what changed (away from expressionist landscapes, toward bold portraits of Black Americans), directly expanding the claim of an “abrupt transformation.” ✓
  • Choice B: “It provides information about Johnson’s travels in support of a claim about his artistic influences.” The underlined sentence says nothing about Johnson’s travels; his decade in Europe is mentioned in the previous sentence, not the underlined one. ✗
  • Choice C: “It recounts a moment in Johnson’s personal life that enabled the success of his subsequent career.” The underlined sentence describes a stylistic shift, not a personal life event, and the passage makes no claim that the shift “enabled success.” ✗
  • Choice D: “It presents evidence that calls into question the previous sentence’s characterization of Johnson’s artistic development.” The underlined sentence confirms and details the abrupt transformation; it does not contradict or cast doubt on the previous sentence. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
